versions.changelog: Quality + visibility update for v0.2.0.5. Adds announcement analytics, tags, duplicate/archive/enable actions, operational diagnostics, and branded catalog artwork.

overview: Display admin announcements with analytics, tags, and diagnostics in the Jellyfin web UI.
name: Announcements
description: Server-wide announcements and maintenance banners with analytics, tags, admin quality-of-life actions, and diagnostics for non-standard installations.
